ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(CONTAINS($Label.ALDSATRecordTypeIds,RecordType.DeveloperName)),NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), OR(ISPICKVAL( Complaint_Dispute__c , 'Yes'), AND(RecordType.Name = 'Case External Sweden', ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Type__c , 'Complaint'))), ISBLANK( Financial_impact__c ), ISPICKVAL(Status ,'Closed') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The field Financial Impact must be informed to save the record
